name: mac-agent-skills
description: Collection of Agent Skills for various tasks

metadata.description: Agent Skills collection for creative, document, and development workflows

plugins.name: creative-skills
plugins.description: Skills for creative and design work: algorithmic art using p5.js, brand guidelines, canvas design for posters and art, Slack GIF creation with optimization, professional theme application, and distinctive frontend design.

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive document processing skills: Word (DOCX) creation/editing with tracked changes, PDF text extraction and form filling, PowerPoint (PPTX) slide generation, and Excel (XLSX) spreadsheet manipulation with formulas.

plugins.name: development-skills
plugins.description: Skills for development workflows: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server building, web artifact creation with React/Tailwind, web application testing with Playwright, skill creation guidance, documentation co-authoring, and internal communications.

plugins.name: video-analysis-skills
plugins.description: AI-powered video content analysis using Volces ARK API. Supports general content analysis, product/functionality analysis, key node identification, and custom prompt analysis.
